mirror.description: Right-half contour mirrored to produce bilateral silhouette.

hu_moments.reference: Hu, M.K. (1962). Visual pattern recognition by moment invariants.

gesture_line.note: PCA on mirrored full contour. Primary axis should align near-vertical for standing frontal pose.

curvature_scale_space.reference: Mokhtarian, F. & Mackworth, A.K. (1992). A theory of multiscale, curvature-based shape representation for planar curves. IEEE TPAMI.

biomechanics.reference: De Leva, P. (1996). Adjustments to Zatsiorsky-Seluyanov's segment inertia parameters. J Biomech.
